post.description:
Create a pending user account and return a one-time setup URL.

The invited user follows the setup URL to choose their own password and
activate the account.  No password is accepted in this request.

Required roles: ``root``, ``super_admin``.
``governed_modules`` is optional for admin (null = all modules).

Activate a pending user account by setting a password.

The ``token`` field must be the one-time setup token returned by
``POST /api/auth/invite``.  No JWT authentication is required — the token
is the credential.  On success the account is activated and a JWT is
returned so the user is immediately logged in.

HTTPAuthorizationCredentials.title: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials
HTTPAuthorizationCredentials.description:
The HTTP authorization credentials in the result of using `HTTPBearer` or
`HTTPDigest` in a dependency.

The HTTP authorization header value is split by the first space.

The first part is the `scheme`, the second part is the `credentials`.

For example, in an HTTP Bearer token scheme, the client will send a header
like:

```
Authorization: Bearer deadbeef12346
```

In this case:

* `scheme` will have the value `"Bearer"`
* `credentials` will have the value `"deadbeef12346"`

HolodeckSimulateRequest.title: HolodeckSimulateRequest
HolodeckSimulateRequest.description:
Run a test message through the pipeline with proposed physics changes.

Provide *either* ``staged_id`` (referencing a pending HITL staged command
whose operation is ``update_domain_physics``) *or* ``physics_override``
(an inline dict of physics fields to merge onto the live physics).

SessionResumeRequest.title: SessionResumeRequest
SessionResumeRequest.description: Client-side transcript + HMAC seal for session resumption.
